---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? What's the expected behavior?

## Alternative Solutions
Any alternative approaches you've considered?

## Examples
Real-world examples of how this would be used:

```python
# Example code showing the feature in action
threat_intel = ThreatIntelDaily()
threat_intel.add_custom_feed(MyAwesomeFeed())
```

## Related Feeds/Integrations
If this is about a new feed or lab integration:
- Feed/Tool name: 
- Link: 
- Documentation: 

## Implementation Ideas
Do you have any ideas on how to implement this?

## Additional Context
Anything else that would be helpful?

## Would You Like to Contribute?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] No, just a suggestion
